ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager ID of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., phone, laptop) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the asset */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was purchased */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the asset (e.g., new, used) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model ID of the asset */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the asset */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the phone model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phone model */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the phone model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laptop_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laptop model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the laptop model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the laptop model */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the laptop model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the phone plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the phone plan */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the phone plan */,
  "data_limit" INTEGER /* Data limit of the phone plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned the asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was assigned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was returned (if applicable) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_assignments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_assignments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned the phone */,
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phone being assigned */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phone plan assigned to the employee */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the phone was assigned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the phone was returned (if applicable) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_assignments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_assignments_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES phone_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_assignments_phone_id FOREIGN KEY ("phone_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laptop_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laptop assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned the laptop */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the laptop was assigned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the laptop was returned (if applicable) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptop_assignments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the department */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was assigned to the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the department (if applicable) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
